trivia_bullets.text: Relief Captain is a Kor Knight Ally — one of Zendikar's most prominent humanoid species, who survived the Eldrazi's return by forming the multiracial allied forces depicted throughout OGW and Battle for Zendikar. The Kor's nomadic, rope-based culture made them natural cavalry and scouting troops in the Zendikari resistance. [Scryfall type_line; WebSearch: mtg.fandom.com Munda/Kor snippets]

Flavor text: "Sometimes gestures of support are small. Sometimes not." [Scryfall] The line is a clean thematic statement for the Support mechanic — OGW's keyword for distributing +1/+1 counters across allies. Support 3 on a 3/3 for 4 mana was considered a reasonable rate for Limited, though it was designed primarily as a draft archetype glue card. [Wizards OGW Mechanics article]

Relief Captain has been reprinted 4 times since OGW: Archenemy: Nicol Bolas (2017), Game Night 2019, Double Masters 2022, and Foundations Jumpstart (2024). The Foundations Jumpstart reprint is notable — Foundations is designed as an evergreen entry-level product, suggesting the card's ETB Support 3 was deemed clean enough to serve as a teaching tool for the counter mechanic. EDHREC rank 21996, the highest (most popular) of the OGW supporting cards in this inventory cluster. [Scryfall prints search]

related_cards.name: General Tazri
related_cards.note: 5-color Ally commander; leads the Zendikari allied forces that Relief Captain belongs to

related_cards.name: Munda, Ambush Leader
related_cards.note: Kor Ally legend; a named Kor commander figure in the same resistance coalition
